data.c_productDescription: Maxol Long Life Grease R2L is a lithium thickened lubricating grease based on mineral oil. The grease contains antioxidants, corrosion inhibitors and EP/ AW additives. The product is a state-of-the-art multipurpose EP grease which can be used in various applications within given temperature limits. The lubricating grease offers good mechanical stability and load carrying capacity, making it suitable for heavily loaded bearings. The polymer gives the product improved adhesiveness and water resistant properties.

data.name: Maxol Biomax Hydraulic Oil - The Maxol Group

data.c_productDescription: Maxol Multivis 32 is an EP multigrade hydraulic oil based on carefully selected, solvent-refined base oils under addition of additives.
data.name: Maxol Multivis 32 - The Maxol Group
Maxol Biodegradable Hydraulic Oil 46 - The Maxol Group
data.c_productDescription: Maxol Biodegradable Hydrualic Oil 46 is a high-grade, biodegradable hydraulic oil based on vegetable oils under addition of additives.

data.name: Maxol Bio Hydrasynth Eco 68 - The Maxol Group
data.c_productDescription: Maxol Bio Hydrasynth Eco 68 is a high-quality hydraulic oil based on biodegradable synthetic esters under addition of additives.

data.name: Maxol Hammer Grease - The Maxol Group
data.c_productDescription:
Maxol Hammer Grease is a complex thickened lubricating grease based on mineral oil. The grease contains antioxidants, corrosion inhibitors and graphite. The product does not contain conventional EP- and AW-additives since they are built in as an integral part of the soap structure.
The functional soap gives the product very good load carrying capacity making it suitable for heavily loaded applications. The grease also has superb mechanical stability, good corrosion protection and excellent water resistance, all of which are important in wet and corrosive environments.

data.name: Maxol Extend 15W/40
data.c_productDescription: Maxol Extend 15W40 is a "new generation" gasoline and diesel engine oil, formulated with solvent-refined base oils and a well-balanced choice of additives.
Maxol Torque FLD 4-30 is a special oil for hydraulic and transmission equipment formulated with solvent refined base oils and selected additives.
data.name: Maxol Torque FLD 4-30 - The Maxol Group
Maxol Permiline Synthetic HD 150  - The Maxol Group
data.c_productDescription: Maxol Permiline Synthetic HD 150 is a synthetic industrial gear oil based on synthesized hydrocarbons under addition of special additives.

data.name: Maxol Super Diesel 40
data.c_productDescription: Maxol Super Diesel 40 is a "new generation" gasoline and diesel engine oil, formulated with solvent-refined base oils and a well-balanced choice of additives.

data.name: Maxol Truck Fleet ®LSP 10W40
data.c_productDescription: This Heavy Duty engine oil is suitable for use in both on-road and off-highway applications. This engine oil contributes to low exhaust emission and particle levels benefits highly to the lifetime of emission control systems. By meeting the requirements of OEM's in Europe and North America this product has a wide choice of application possibilities. This product can be applied in Euro 5 and Euro 6 engines with SCR exhaust gas system and in Euro 3 and Euro 4 engines, when indicated by the manufacturer.

Maxol Prosap® C4 5W/30 is a fuel economy, universal motor oil, developed according the most recent technology, based on specially selected synthetic base oils. By applying advanced additives the exceptional performance of this low SAPS motor oil is accentuated.
data.name: Maxol Prosap® C4 - 5W/30
Food Safe & Pharmaceutical
data.c_productDescription:
Maxol Lubricants are the sole Irish agent of ANDEROL Food Grade and Pharmaceutical Lubricants.
ANDEROL Speciality lubricants can help you achieve your food safety goals by reducing the possibility of toxic contamination during the most critical stages of the value chain. This range of oils and greases have also been proven to offer superior performance and protection of equipment even in the most severe and heavy-duty conditions.

data.name: AgriMax - Plus® Calcium Grease
data.c_productDescription: Maxol AgriMax-Plus® Calcium Grease is an anhydrous calcium thickened lubricating grease based on a mineral oil. The grease contains antioxidants, corrosion inhibitors and EP/AW additives, making the product suitable for the lubrication of medium loaded bearings and in wet and corrosive environments. The lubricating grease has excellent adhesion and water resistance can be used in both industrial and automotive applications. The grease is suitable for a wide range of plain and rolling bearings.

Maxol Turbosynth® LSP Plus 5W/30 is a long drain diesel engine oil designed for use in the very latest trucks and buses. This universal engine oil has been developed for Euro IV, Euro V and Euro VI engines and comes fully approved by leading original equipment manufacturers.
data.name: Maxol Turbosynth® LSP Plus 5W/30
